import React from 'react'; import { Outlet, Link, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuthStore } from '../store/authStore'; import { LayoutDashboard, ScanLine, ShieldAlert, Settings, LogOut, PlusCircle } from 'lucide-react'; import './Layout.css'; function Layout() { const location = useLocation(); const { user, logout } = useAuthStore(); const isActive = (path) => location.pathname === path; return (

{user?.username?.charAt(0).toUpperCase() || 'U'}
